promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong existing intake batch after the archived zip-index reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent family already isolates repeated megaboot-preserving upgrade intent, recurring thread topology, unstable ZIP semantics, a comparatively stable SIM contract, unresolved A1 mode control, and extraction-loop mechanics as system content.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The archived upgrade-plan reduction was used for upgrade intent and nonclosure alignment, the sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the SIM approval and evidence packet, and the archived zip-index reduction was used for transport-boundary drift around ZIP language.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the multi-pass upgrade family is the stronger immediate comparison anchor for later graph-prompt intake.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The upgrade-pass family parent batch plus the archived upgrade-plan, sims evidence-boundary, and archived zip-index A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable topology, ZIP, SIM, mode-control, and extraction-loop seams for this pass.

candidate_items.name: STAGED_EXTRACTION_SCAFFOLD_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the family as repeated extraction scaffolding rather than nine independent authorities.

candidate_items.name: MEGABOOT_INSIDE_SOURCE_AND_THREAD_CONSOLIDATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest repeated topology intent while keeping Thread S residue and redesign pressure visible.

candidate_items.name: ZIP_SUBAGENT_BOUNDARY_DESIRED_BUT_UNSTABLE_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the desired ZIP boundary and the explicit failure to stabilize it across the family.

candidate_items.name: SIM_APPROVAL_AND_EVIDENCE_RETURN_CONTRACT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves one of the cleanest recurring packets in the family: approval-gated deterministic execution with evidence routed back upstream.

candidate_items.name: A1_MODE_CONTROL_REAL_BUT_ENFORCEMENT_DOUBTFUL_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the family's clearest unresolved control seam without smoothing away its enforcement doubt.

candidate_items.name: EXTRACTION_LOOP_AND_REDUNDANCY_DEFENSE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the reason the family exists as a family: repeated passes are an intentional defense against drift and summarization loss.

quarantined_items.name: CLEAN_THREAD_S_ELIMINATION_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family repeatedly reintroduces Thread S as a live seam even while describing absorption pressure.

quarantined_items.name: FULLY_SETTLED_ZIP_SUBAGENT_ONTOLOGY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family wants a clean ZIP boundary but repeatedly preserves ontology collapse across template, output, and system communication roles.

quarantined_items.name: DETERMINISTIC_A1_MODE_ENFORCEMENT_AS_SOLVED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent family explicitly keeps mode-control pressure and enforcement doubt together.

quarantined_items.name: FINALIZED_SAVE_LOAD_HASH_AND_FULLPLUS_RESTORE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family preserves save/load and verification pressure without settling formulas, invalidation behavior, or FULL+ and FULL++ doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: EXTRACTION_OUTPUTS_AS_AUTHORITATIVE_RUNTIME_SPEC
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family treats extraction artifacts as process defenses under drift, not as runtime or control-surface authority by themselves.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent family's strongest reusable packets: staged extraction scaffolding, megaboot-preserving topology intent, unstable ZIP boundary, stable SIM approval flow, unresolved A1 mode control, and extraction-loop defense.
They preserve the pass family as a contradiction-rich comparison mirror without letting repeated restatements self-authorize into runtime truth.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later upgrade-doc synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain topology-settlement overreads, ontology-settlement overreads, solved-control overreads, finalized restore-doctrine overreads, or extraction-authority overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent family is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the archived upgrade-plan, sims evidence-boundary, and archived zip-index A2-mid batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded multi-pass upgrade-family reduction pass.
